title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.827 - Officer Timothy Nielson memorial bridge designated for bridge on CST Connecticut Avenue in city of Joplin
text:
227.827.  Officer Timothy Nielson memorial bridge designated for bridge on CST Connecticut Avenue in city of Joplin. — The bridge on CST Connecticut Avenue that crosses over Interstate 44 within the city of Joplin in Newton County shall be designated the "Officer Timothy Nielson Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2023 S.B. 127)
